author: Ckvermouth
title: Gapless playback feature missing
content: Have been using this for years and love it. The only downside is it doesn’t support gapless playback when playing local live concert music files. Hope this feature will be added in.

author: ginter88
title: Nice App…
content: Nice App…

author: SalmanZoldyck
title: Great App & Feedback
content: This is really a great app to have, especially since it’s free and offers features that usually only come with paid versions. With some improvements, I think it could be even better. For example, adding a crossfade between songs would be nice, as well as a speed controller (0.5x, 1x, 1.5x, 2x) that actually changes the way the song sounds — like 0.5x giving a slowed & reverbed effect, and 2x making it fast and high-pitched. There used to be an app that did this, called Music Cloud, but it no longer exists. Since then, I’ve tried countless other apps to find the same features, and this is the only one that offers even more. Anyway, those are my thoughts on improvements that I hope will be added.

author: cruizer_ph
title: Used to be great, now a mere shadow of its old self
content: This used to be a very good player, probably the best for iOS the last time I actively used it. Tried it just now and felt sad about how its quality has just plummeted. It keeps on hanging and the ease of use features it used to have are gone. Maybe because it's now maintained by a different developer or company. Goodbye Flacbox... it was fun while it lasted.

author: Paul Mina
title: Sneaky developer
content: This developer is very sneaky. He has three apps that do the same thing all with various functionality. He could easily put it all into one app, but he has separated the purchases of other apps. It’s a very tricky way of milking the same code base.
